short_description: Add a refined finishing touch with the Alfani Navy Blue tie. Crafted from premium polyester with a smooth finish, this tie delivers sharp style at an accessible price. Perfect for the office or a special occasion.
long_description: Alfani offers modern, accessible luxury for the style-conscious man. This tie is crafted from high-quality polyester with a smooth, silk-like finish that drapes beautifully. The Navy Blue hue adds a refined pop of colour to your workwear rotation. An ideal gift for the man who appreciates contemporary design without the luxury price tag. Designed to complement both classic suits and smart-casual blazers.

short_description: Elevate your look with the Calvin Klein Navy Blue tie. Made from 100% silk with a sleek, minimalist design that reflects the brand's iconic aesthetic. A wardrobe essential for the modern gentleman.
long_description: Calvin Klein is synonymous with clean lines, modern minimalism, and understated luxury. This Navy Blue tie is crafted from 100% silk with a lustrous finish and perfect weight for knotting. The minimalist design carries the brand's iconic aesthetic without excess ornamentation. Whether for the boardroom or an evening event, this tie makes a confident, refined statement. A timeless investment in polished personal style.

short_description: The Michael Kors Navy Blue tie brings modern sophistication to any outfit. Crafted from luxe silk with a refined finish, it strikes the perfect balance between classic and contemporary. Ideal for work or weekend events.
long_description: Michael Kors brings American sportswear luxury to accessories. This Navy Blue tie is crafted from premium silk with a smooth hand-feel and clean drape. The modern cut strikes the ideal balance between classic elegance and contemporary style. Signature branding adds understated recognition without being overt. Perfect for the man who wants versatile, polished style from office to evening.

short_description: Set sail for style with the Nautica Navy Blue tie. Featuring the brand's signature maritime-inspired design with quality construction that Nautica is known for. A great choice for adding a sporty-elegant touch.
long_description: Nautica blends classic American prep style with maritime heritage. This Navy Blue tie features quality construction and a design inspired by nautical aesthetics. The brand's attention to detail ensures a tie that holds its knot and drape throughout the day. A sporty-elegant option that works as well with a navy suit as with weekend chinos. Great for adding a touch of heritage to your accessory collection.

short_description: Make a bold statement with the Rooster Orange tie. Known for distinctive British flair and vivid patterns, Rooster ties let you express personality while maintaining a polished look. For men who aren't afraid of colour.
long_description: Rooster is a British brand celebrated for its vivid colours, bold patterns, and quirky character. This Orange tie stands out from the crowd with distinctive design and quality craftsmanship. Crafted from premium materials with a generous length and perfect width for modern ties. The brand's sense of fun lets you express personality while staying office-appropriate. For men who want their accessories to start conversations.

short_description: Inject classic British elegance with the T.M. Lewin Burgundy tie. Crafted from fine silk with a traditional drape and hand-finished details. A timeless accessory that never goes out of style.
long_description: T.M. Lewin is a British heritage brand known for traditional formalwear excellence. This Burgundy tie is crafted from fine silk with a luxurious hand-feel and excellent knot retention. Hand-finished details and a classic width make it ideal for traditional and contemporary suits alike. The refined design reflects T.M. Lewin's long history of providing quality formal accessories. A distinguished choice for business dress codes and special occasions.

short_description: Sport iconic American style with the Tommy Hilfiger Navy Blue tie. Featuring the signature logo and quality construction, this tie combines heritage branding with versatile everyday appeal.
long_description: Tommy Hilfiger delivers iconic American sportswear style with global recognition. This Navy Blue tie features the signature branding and quality construction the brand is known for. The versatile design works seamlessly with both classic and modern tailoring. Crafted from quality materials with a polished finish that elevates any look. A wardrobe staple for men who appreciate heritage branding with an relaxed, confident edge.
